input.command: bd create --title="SessionStart: hard-inline caveman mode" --description="Inline caveman SKILL.md into context-bootstrap.sh SessionStart context. Skips Skill tool round-trip on first turn. Kills communication-style.md rule (single source of truth). Net savings: ~2.5k tok/session." --type=feature --priority=2

bd create --title="Retroactive bd prime SessionStart dedupe on update" --description="install.ts:1163 already has retirement logic but doesn't apply to existing local settings.json. Make 'oisin-dev update' rewrite existing settings.json to drop SessionStart 'bd prime' (beads marketplace plugin already provides it). Saves ~1.1k tok cold start." --type=bug --priority=1 &
bd create --title="Drop bd prime call from pre-compact-prime.sh" --description="pre-compact-prime.sh:23 calls 'bd prime' but beads plugin's PreCompact hook already does. Same dedupe pattern as SessionStart. Saves ~1.1k tok per compaction. Hook should only emit .dev.config.json deltas not covered by bd prime." --type=bug --priority=2 &
bd create --title="Drop bd ready emission from context-bootstrap.sh" --description="context-bootstrap.sh:64 emits 'bd ready | head -5'. Beads plugin SessionStart already shows ready queue. Saves ~150-400 tok/session." --type=task --priority=2 &
bd create --title="Drop using-superpowers nudge from context-bootstrap.sh" --description="context-bootstrap.sh:13 emits 'IMPORTANT: FIRST action ... using-superpowers' nudge. Claude Code SessionStart system reminder already enforces this. Redundant ~50 tok." --type=task --priority=3 &
bd create --title="Compress ai-behavior.md ~40%" --description="ai-behavior.md is the largest always-on rule (5KB). Half is examples. Collapse example pairs into one-line bullets. Same enforcement (banned-words and stop hooks do the actual work). Target: under 3KB. Saves ~500 tok always-on." --type=task --priority=2 &
bd create --title="Use @.dev.config.json import in CLAUDE.md instead of inlining commands" --description="commands.md is generated with values stringified from .dev.config.json. Claude Code resolves @-imports natively — switch to '@.dev.config.json' so file is read on demand rather than every session. Saves ~100 tok always-on, single source of truth." --type=task --priority=3 &
wait
cat /Users/oisin/dev/oisin-dev/mise.toml 2>/dev/null; echo ---; ls /Users/oisin/dev/oisin-dev/.beads 2>/dev/null; echo ---; which bd; ls -la $(which bd)

bd create --title="Per-repo bd binary resolution via shim" --description="Hooks today rely on PATH 'bd' lookup, fragile across mise/aqua/CI/subagent contexts. Install a shim at .claude/hooks/bin/bd that resolves in order: ./node_modules/.bin/bd → mise exec -- bd → PATH bd. Hooks PATH-prepend .claude/hooks/bin. No .dev.config.json bloat, no hard mise dep, deterministic per-repo resolution. Pairs with bd prime dedupe (style-template-fg6) — single resolution path across hooks and beads plugin." --type=feature --priority=2

bd update style-template-25j --notes="Default behavior, not opt-in. Shim resolution applied to every install." &
bd create --title="Path-scope non-safety rules behind globs" --description="Move code-quality, architecture, performance, verifier-loop, coding-principles rules behind glob frontmatter so they only inject when matching files are read. Keep ai-behavior, destructive, scope-discipline, commands always-on (safety semantics). Always-on shrinks ~9k → ~3k tok." --type=feature --priority=2 &
bd create --title="Remove SessionStart bd prime registration from oisin-dev install" --description="Stop generating SessionStart bd prime in claude-settings.ts. Beads marketplace plugin owns it. Hard-fail oisin-dev install if beads plugin not installed. Pairs with style-template-fg6 (retroactive prune) and style-template-zeu (drop from pre-compact)." --type=task --priority=2 &
bd create --title="Reorder SessionStart context for prompt cache pinning" --description="Static portion (rules, config, deps) leads SessionStart context; dynamic portion (branch, ready queue) trails. Anthropic prompt cache TTL is 5min — stable prefix maximizes cache hits across consecutive sessions. Add 5-min TTL guidance to README." --type=task --priority=3 &
bd create --title="Consolidate shell hooks into TS/Bun dispatcher under dist/hooks/" --description="Replace 30 shell scripts with single TS dispatcher built by Bun. One process per event, structured I/O, share code with src/ (manifest, config, detect). Drop bash+jq runtime dep. Faster cold start. Easier tests. Ship behind a flag, migrate hooks one event at a time. Big refactor but unlocks tier 4 MCP work + future cache logic." --type=feature --priority=2 &
wait

input.description: Check existing tests for bd prime prune

input.command: cd /Users/oisin/dev/oisin-dev && git log --oneline --all -- src/install.ts 2>/dev/null | head -10; echo ---; git log --oneline -- .claude/settings.json 2>/dev/null | head -5
